A Rajya Sabha rummy: How BJP manages ‘floating majority’ with bellwether backings
description: ​When the BJP swept to power in 2014 with a decisive majority in the Lok Sabha, it did not carry that dominance into the Rajya Sabha. The Upper House, by design, is insulated from electoral waves. Its members are elected by state assemblies, and their terms are staggered, ensuring continuity and preventing sudden shifts. This meant that even as the BJP commanded brute strength in the Lower House, it remained a minority in the Upper House for years. That imbalance mattered!

description: The US faces a paradox in its conflict with Iran, relying on the nation's oil to stabilize global markets while simultaneously trying to weaken it. This move offers temporary relief but highlights the limited options available.

title: 'Wasn't easy': Anaya reveals Sanjay's role after gender-affirming surgery
description: Anaya Bangar shared emotional journey after gender-affirming surgery, saying, "This journey wasn't easy… not just for me, but for my family too." Anaya highlighted Sanjay Bangar’s evolving support, calling it "real, unconditional, and strong." Once a cricketer, Anaya reflected on early identity struggles, recalling, "I used to… say I'm a girl."

title: Chennai soars above gridlock: Mega flyover surge set to rewrite city commute

description: Directed by Aditya Dhar, the high-octane sequel 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is rewriting box office history, netting a staggering Rs. 246.99 crore in just 60 hours. Following the massive success of the 2025 original, the Ranveer Singh-starrer opened to a record-breaking Rs. 102.55 crore on Day 1, maintaining an iron grip on the domestic market despite its sprawling 3-hour and 49-minute runtime. Upped by the festive Ugadi and Gudi Padwa window, the espionage thriller has seen a massive Saturday surge, with Day 3 morning shows alone raking in Rs. 20.72 crore across 6,622 screenings.

Google announces it is shutting down Firebase Studio, less than a year after its launch
description: Google is shutting down its Firebase Studio AI workspace on March 22, 2027, less than a year after its April 2025 launch. The company is consolidating its AI developer offerings, moving lessons learned into Google AI Studio and Google Antigravity. Core Firebase services remain unaffected, with a year-long transition period for users.

title: Yrs after Zuckerberg called it 'next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
description: Meta is shutting down its virtual reality social network, Horizon Worlds, for Quest headsets by June 15, 2026. The platform, a significant metaverse investment, struggled to gain traction and will transition to a mobile-only experience. This move aims to streamline Meta's VR offerings and focus development efforts.
